title: Qiyaasaha Khatarta Sarrifka
subtitle: Qiyaas saameynta hoos-u-dhaca sterling-ka ee kharashaadka soo dejintaada iyo faa'iidada badeecooyinka. Ogow khadadkee ka hooseeya faa'iidadaada ugu yar — ka hor inta lacagtu aysan dhaqaaqin.
labelMinMargin: Faa'iidada ugu yar la aqbali karo (%)
labelProductLines: Khadadka badeecada — ku dar khad kasta si gaar ah si aad u hesho kala-qaybin
riskBannerTitle: {n} khad badeeco ayaa ka hooseeya faa'iidadaada ugu yar ee {minMargin}% xaalad daran
riskBannerTitlePlural: {n} khad badeeco ayaa ka hooseeya faa'iidadaada ugu yar ee {minMargin}% xaalad daran
riskBannerBody: {lines} — saameyn sannadeed ilaa {amount} haddii sterling-ku hoos u dhaco 15% ka soo horjeeda {currency}.
allSafeMsg: Dhammaan khadadka badeecadu waxay ka sarreeyaan faa'iidada {minMargin}% xataa xaalad hoos-u-dhac 15% daran.
actionReviewPricing: Dib u eeg qiimaynta {lines} — luminta faa'iidada {pp}pp waxay u baahan tahay kordhin qiime ama dhimis kharash si loo dheeliyo
actionForwardContract: Ka fiirso qandaraas lacag hore si aad ugu xannibto qiimaha GBP/{currency} ee hadda ee 3-6 bilood ee soo socda ee wax-iibsigaaga
actionSupplierGbp: Weydii alaab-qeybiyayaashaada qiimaynta GBP ama EUR si loo baabi'iyo gebi ahaanba soo-gaadhka {currency} qandaraasyada cusub
actionFxBuffer: Ku dhis dheeli sarrif 10% ah xisaabinta kharashka soo-gaadhka dhammaan wax-iibsiga {currency}-ku qiimeeyay
actionSetAlert: Deji digniin sterling — haddii GBP/{currency} uu hoos u dhaco in ka badan 5% qiimaha maanta, dib u eeg qiimaynta dhammaan khadadka saameeyay
btnAskDeep: Weydii AskBiz inuu tan si buuxda u qiyaaso →
emptyTitle: Ogow soo-gaadhkaaga sarrifka ka hor inta qiimuhu aysan dhaqaaqin
emptyBody: Kor ku geli lacagtaada soo dejinta, kharashka bishii, iyo faa'iidooyinka badeecada. AskBiz waxay qiyaasi doontaa xaalado hoos-u-dhac oo fudud, dhexdhexaad ah, iyo daran oo waxay ku tusi doontaa si sax ah khadadka ka hooseeya faa'iidadaada ugu yar.
promptChina: Waxaan Shiinaha ka soo dejiyaa USD
promptEur: Soo-gaadhkayga ugu weyn waa alaab-qeybiyayaasha EUR
promptDollarPound: Doollar ayaan ku iibsadaa waxaanan ku iibiyaa pound
